title: Implement ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS calculation: compute gun base attribute modifiers and write to component

reference_files.reason: System 5: Attribute calculation pipeline - modifier computation, write to ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS, slot=MAINHAND
Component refresh timing and modifier ID stability (modularshoot:gun_base)
Preset attribute default values - used as gun base values when gun definition doesn't specify

acceptance_criteria: AttributeModifierService class provides method to compute AttributeModifier set from a GunDefinition
Each gun base attribute produces an AttributeModifier with Operation.ADD_VALUE, ID=modularshoot:gun_base, value=(gun definition stat or attribute_meta default value)
Modifiers are written to DataComponents.ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS with EquipmentSlotGroup.MAINHAND
ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS component has showInTooltip set to false
Method exists to refresh/recompute ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS on an existing gun ItemStack
Gun ItemStack creation (from creative tab, command, or API) triggers initial modifier computation
Attributes not specified in gun definition use the default_value from attribute_meta as the base value
Modifier ID is stable: ResourceLocation 'modularshoot:gun_base' for all gun base modifiers
